title: abeec 12 Pack of Jiggly Balls | Squishy Sensory Stress Balls for Kids & Adults | Party Bag Fillers, Fidget Toys & Anxiety Relief
features: Perfect Party Bag Fillers – These soft, jiggly fidget balls make fantastic party favours for birthdays, weddings, and celebrations! Add them to kids’ party bags along with other fun treats like bouncy balls, mini notebooks, and bubbles.
Squishy Stress Relief Toys – Designed for squeezing, squishing, and stretching, these jiggly balls help relieve stress, anxiety, and tension in both kids and adults.
Sensory & Fidget Toy Pack – Great for children with ADHD, autism, OCD, or sensory processing needs, these calming, therapeutic stress balls encourage focus, relaxation, and fine motor development.
Classroom Prizes & Reward Treats – Teachers can use this 12-pack of fidget balls as classroom rewards, treasure box prizes, or giveaways to keep students engaged and motivated.
Vibrant Assorted Colours – Each set includes 12 squishy stress balls in a mix of bright, eye-catching colours like yellow, green, orange, pink, purple, and blue—fun for all ages!
